creator: tiago.gasiba@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 259003
git patch

Hi.

I have done the updates that Zsolt requested - this leads to an update to a newer version of rhtvision. I have also removed the dependency on gcc - the port is now compiling with clang. Additionally, I checked portlink, portfmt, and portclippy - all is good. I also took the liberty to add myself as maintainer. In case bmeyer wants to maintain this port, I am fine with it - please add your name, and take my patch as a suggestion.
@Zsolt - I was (currently) not able to compile with poudriere, not because the port is broken, but because of (current) hardware issues - running on a VM on AARCH64. In case you have the opportunity to recompile with poudriere and see if the error message (re)appears, that would be great; otherwise I can also check this in the next days...

Thanks and
Best Regards,
Tiago
